name: kimi-plugin-cc
description: Claude Code plugin that delegates review, challenge, ask, and rescue work to the local kimi-code CLI.

scripts.check: bun run build && bun run check:surfaces && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test && git diff --exit-code -- dist plugins/kimi-codex && UNTRACKED="$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- dist plugins/kimi-codex)" && { [ -z "$UNTRACKED" ] || { echo "drift gate: untracked dist/codex files (stage them and re-run check):"; echo "$UNTRACKED"; exit 1; }; }
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/vendor/shell-quote && cp runtime/vendor/shell-quote/LICENSE dist/vendor/shell-quote/LICENSE
